_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Production Status Report
summary: The Production Status Report provides hardware build and delivery information for the specified reporting period and is utilized for surveillance of production contracts.
description_purpose: The Production Status Report provides hardware build and delivery information for the specified reporting period. This report is utilized for surveillance of production contracts.
application_interrelationship: This Data Item Description (DID) contains the format and content preparation instructions for the data product generated by the specific and discrete task requirement as delineated in the contract.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Format.
preparation_instructions.content: The Production Status Report format shall be contractor selected. Unless effective presentation would be degraded, the initially used format arrangement shall be used for all subsequent submissions.

preparation_instructions.title: Content.
preparation_instructions.content: The Production Status Report shall contain the following:

children.title: Identification.
children.content: The data indicated below shall be contained in a title page or on the first page of the report.

children.title: Title or identification of the system, component, program, or project.
Type of report (e.g., monthly, interim, final).
Summary.
children.content: The summary shall include a brief statement of overall production build and delivery status.

children.title: Production delivery (DD250) status.
children.content:
The production delivery (DD250) status for the reporting period shall be as follows:

PRODUCTION DELIVERY (DD250) STATUS

MONTH

CLIN#

S
CS
D
CD

S: CONTRACT SCHEDULE BY MONTH
CS: CUMULATIVE CONTRACT SCHEDULE BY MONTH
D: DELIVERIES BY MONTH (ACTUAL AND FORECASTED)
CD: CUMULATIVE DELIVERIES BY MONTH

* IDENTIFY BY CONTRACT LINE ITEM NUMBER (CLIN) HOW MANY UNITS ARE PERIODIC ENVIRONMENTAL TEST (PET), QUALITY ASSURANCE LOT ACCEPTANCE TEST (QALAT) EXPENDED, QALAT RETIRED, OR AS REQUIRED BY THE PROCURING ACTIVITY.

children.title: Production build status.
children.content:
The production build status for the reporting period shall be as follows:

PRODUCTION BUILD STATUS

MONTH

CLIN#

F
CF
A
CA

F: FORECASTED BUILD PER MONTH
CF: CUMULATIVE FORECASTED BUILD PER MONTH
A: ACTUAL BUILD PER MONTH
CA: CUMULATIVE ACTUAL BUILD PER MONTH

children.title: QALAT.
children.content:
The QALAT status for the reporting period shall be as follows:

QALAT STATUS

QALAT COMPLETED NOT DD250'D -

LOT #: QUANTITY

AWAITING QALAT -

LOT #: QUANTITY

children.title: Hardware shipment status.
children.content:
The hardware shipment status for the reporting period shall be as follows:

HARDWARE SHIPMENT STATUS

CLIN #: SHIP DATE SHIP QUANTITY DESTINATION

children.title: Contract deliveries status.
children.content: Production build and delivery status including the prior month's build and deliveries by CLIN and the forecasted build and deliveries by CLIN by month for the remainder of the contract delivery period. A statement shall be included to indicate whether contract deliveries are on schedule; if not on schedule, state reason(s) for delinquencies and recommendations for recovery. Also include all assumptions which form the basis of the build and delivery forecast.

children.title: Report preparer.
children.content: Name of person(s) preparing report and telephone number(s).

children.title: Appendices.
children.content: Appendices, where applicable, for tables, references, charts, or other descriptive material. Each appendix shall be identified and referenced in the appropriate area of the report.
